_readme: Registry of extra Central Economy types files to load WITHOUT touching vanilla db/types.xml. At prestart, Apply-CustomCE.ps1 copies each 'from' file into the active mission's custom/ folder as 'name', then regenerates ONE <ce folder="custom"> block in that mission's cfgeconomycore.xml listing them. 'from' is relative to the DayZ server dir: use custom-ce/<file> for our own repo-authored types, or a mod's doc path (e.g. @aibandits/doc/bandit_types.xml) to pull the mod's own file so it tracks the installed mod version - never hand-duplicated. PER-MAP OVERRIDE: if custom-ce/maps/<mission>/<name> exists it beats 'from' for that mission (the Expansion types need it - Enoch defines no Tier4, so its variant re-tiers 31 types). 'type' is the cfgeconomycore file type: types | spawnabletypes | events. Add a modded types file = add ONE line here. DISABLE, DON'T DELETE: set "disabled": true on an entry to keep it here but drop it from the CE - REQUIRED when its mod is turned off in mods.conf, since loading types for a mod's classes after the mod is unloaded SEGV-crashes the server on boot. ORDER IS LOAD-BEARING: files register in this order and a later file's <type> replaces an earlier one of the same name - expansion_types_tuning.xml only works because it sits AFTER expansion_types.xml, so never reorder this list. Missing/invalid sources are skipped fail-soft; vanilla types.xml is never touched; a game update that rewrites cfgeconomycore.xml gets the block re-added next boot.

files.name: bandit_types.xml
files._note: DISABLED while @aibandits is off in mods.conf - its types reference InfectedBanditBase, which crashes the CE when the mod is unloaded. Re-enable (drop disabled) when @aibandits returns.
